mapper.select: WITH temp AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(IFA_ORDER_NO) IFA_ORDER_NO , TO_CHAR(IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , TO_CHAR(BUTEN_CODE) BUTEN_CODE , TO_CHAR(ACCOUNT_NUMBER) ACCOUNT_NUMBER , TO_CHAR(CUSTOMER_ID) CUSTOMER_ID , TO_CHAR(SPECIFIC_KBN) SPECIFIC_KBN , TO_CHAR(JO_ZEI_KBN) JO_ZEI_KBN , TO_CHAR(CHECK_SOR) CHECK_SOR , TO_CHAR(ORDER_NUM) ORDER_NUM FROM T_JP_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NUM = #{req.ecOrderNo} AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCEPT_DATE >= #{req.inputDate} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = ( SELECT MAX(IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) FROM T_JP_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NUM = #{req.ecOrderNo} AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCEPT_DATE >= #{req.inputDate} ) ) SELECT NVL(IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_T_JP_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0') ) IFA_ORDER_NO , IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO + 1 IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , BUTEN_CODE , ACCOUNT_NUMBER , CUSTOMER_ID KOKYAKU_ID , SPECIFIC_KBN TOKUTEIKOUZA_KBN , JO_ZEI_KBN JOUTOEKIZEI_KBN , CHECK_SOR , ORDER_NUM EC_ORDER_NO FROM ( SELECT * FROM temp UNION ALL SELECT NULL IFA_ORDER_NO , '0' IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , #{req.butenCode} BUTEN_CODE , #{req.accountNumber} ACCOUNT_NUMBER , #{req.kokyakuId} CUSTOMER_ID , #{req.tokuteiKouzaKbn} SPECIFIC_KBN , NULL JO_ZEI_KBN , #{req.checkSor} CHECK_SOR , #{req.ecOrderNo} ORDER_NUM FROM dual WHERE (SELECT count(*) FROM temp) = 0 )
